hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"Model-fit check: confirm the current model suits this task before invoking a subagent (see .claude/agents/model-selector.md).","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Pre-agent model-fit: confirm current model is right for this task before spawning a subagent. If not, tell user to switch first."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Model-fit check: if this prompt starts a new task or changes the task type, emit the one-line model-fit verdict per .claude/agents/model-selector.md BEFORE doing other work or tool calls - Model: <tier> OK - <reason> if the current model fits, or Suggest /model <tier> - <reason> if not. Never switch models implicitly (no subagent model override); prompt the user and wait for them to switch."}}'
